titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the School of Management, Yale University, Records of the Associate Dean for Development and Alumni Relations
School of Management, Yale University, Records of the Associate Dean for Development and Alumni Relations
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday November 30, 2024 at 03:53

did.unittitle: School of Management, Yale University, records of the associate dean for development and alumni relations
did.abstract: The records consist of administrative files maintained by the associate dean for development and alumni relations, School of Management, Yale University.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 30-B (YRG 30-B), Records of deputy, associate, and assistant deans of the Yale School of Management.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the School of Management, 2006.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: School of Management, Yale University, Records of the Associate Dean for Development and Alumni Relations (RU 1007). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by subject.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of administrative files maintained by the associate dean for development and alumni relations, School of Management, Yale University.

did.unittitle: Annual Fund (includes correspondence, reports, reference and case)
History of SOM's Major Gift Development
MacAvoy's Response to Long-Term Development Plan
Center for Study and Reform Regulatory Institutions
Center for Urban and Regional Policy
